claim: After the serving namespace exists, intelligence_server can move behind it while preserving top-level imports through a compatibility wrapper.
mechanism: The serving surface already had a stable namespace seam, so the main intelligence extraction and delivery module can move behind that seam without changing callers. Keeping a thin top-level wrapper preserves current imports while making the serving namespace a real implementation boundary instead of only a naming layer.
boundary: This move does not relocate the whole serving surface yet. Runtime, advisor, context injection, and MCP-serving modules still remain top-level until their dependency graph is cleaned up further.
